from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, ProcessPoolExecutor
import time


def process_items(items):
    executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4)
    futures = [executor.submit(work, item) for item in items]
    results = [f.result() for f in futures]
    return results


def parallel_compute(data):
    pool = ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=8)
    futures = [pool.submit(heavy_task, chunk) for chunk in data]
    output = [f.result() for f in futures]
    return output


def fetch_urls(urls):
    executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10)
    results = list(executor.map(fetch_url, urls))
    return results


def batch_upload(files):
    pool = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=4)
    futures = []
    for f in files:
        futures.append(pool.submit(upload_file, f))
    for future in futures:
        future.result()
